# Woven SFX
> Open source sound effects for AI agents.

## Install
npx skills add woven-labs/woven-sfx --skill woven-sfx -g -y

## Also setup
MCP: npx -y woven-sfx-mcp (see skills/woven-sfx/references/mcp-setup.md)
Sounds: cd your-project && bash ~/.agents/skills/woven-sfx/scripts/pull-library.sh

## Sound library path
1. WOVEN_SFX_LIBRARY env
2. sfx-library in .claude/project.md
3. ./sounds/sfx/ under cwd

## Catalog
https://sfx.woven.video/catalog.json

## MCP tools
sfx_search, sfx_pull, sfx_resolve, sfx_list_installed

## Skill
~/.agents/skills/woven-sfx/SKILL.md
